case_title: VALUECLICK, INC. et al VS. INTERTAINER, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALUECLICK, INC. MEDIAPLEX, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT INTERTAINER, INC. DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-09-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-24-2003
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT INTERTAINER, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALUECLICK, INC. MEDIAPLEX, INC.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE; FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALUECLICK, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-16-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALUECLICK, INC. MEDIAPLEX, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERTAINER, INC. $39,052.93 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $39,052.93, FOR DETAILS SEE SCANNED DOC
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND ENTIRE ACTION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALUECLICK, INC. MEDIAPLEX, INC. SERVED DEC-10-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INTERTAINER, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT PRIOR TO THE CASE MANAGEMENT. THE MAY-09-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OFJUDGMENT WITHOUT NOTICE (CCP SEC. 664.6) FILED BY VALUECLICK, INC. MEDIAPLEX, INC. INTERTAINER, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFTS DOES 1 THROUGH 50, ONLY IN THE EVENT THAT STIPULATED JUDGMENT IS ENTERED AGAINST DEFT INTERTAINER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE
